# 
When I tried launching the game with ```PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%``` my system became laggy and I thought I just experienced a system crash, however I could still click and open stuff with long delay in seconds, I have tried alt+f4 and ctrl-q and the game did not close at all, I managed to peek by virtual desktop and saw that the game has already crashed but it was taking too long and I had to force shutdown
# 
When I tried ```PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%```  as the launch option I prepared the system monitor to watch CPU, GPU and RAM usage, and on launch I saw the RAM usage spiked to using 99% and i could not kill process as i also used my terminal to run ```top``` and i do not know what is the PID of the game, i was at the mercy of the game crashing on its own to close itself and no inputs where being accepted by the game but luckily linux detected something about high RAM consumption and closed both steam and the game.
